title: SBA AI Adoption Reporting Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Small Business.
summary: This policy document, the SBA AI Adoption Reporting Act of 2026, is likely related to a US law requiring the Small Business Administration to report on the adoption of artificial intelligence by small businesses. The aim of the act is to track and improve AI adoption among small businesses, possibly to provide resources or support.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: This policy aims to protect families from rising costs caused by the energy consumption of artificial intelligence (AI) data centers. The goal is to alleviate the financial burden on households resulting from these increased energy costs.

title: Conversational AI Services Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: The Conversational AI Services Act is a policy governing the use of conversational AI services within a particular jurisdiction or organization. The specifics of the policy are unknown due to the lack of available information.

title: Homestake AI Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources.
summary: The Homestake AI Act of 2026 is a proposed law aimed at regulating the development and use of artificial intelligence in the United States, likely imposing new standards and guidelines on the technology. The specifics of the act are currently unknown but it appears to be a comprehensive policy addressing AI.

title: Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Armed Services.
summary: The Responsible Artificial Intelligence Defense Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at regulating and ensuring accountability in the development and use of artificial intelligence. Its objectives likely involve protecting national interests, human rights, and public safety in the context of emerging AI technologies.

title: SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship.
summary: The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at utilizing Artificial Intelligence capabilities within the Small Business Administration. The act seeks to leverage AI to improve operations and services for small businesses, though specific details are unavailable without further information.

title: FARM AI Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Agriculture.
summary: The FARM AI Act of 2026 aims to regulate and govern the development and use of Artificial Intelligence in agricultural settings. The specific details and requirements of the Act are not available, but it likely addresses concerns surrounding AI in farming practices.

title: American Artificial Intelligence Leadership and Uniformity Act
action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Oversight and Investigations.
summary: The American Artificial Intelligence Leadership and Uniformity Act aims to establish guidelines and standards for the development and use of artificial intelligence in the United States. It seeks to promote uniformity and leadership in the field, potentially impacting its adoption and regulations across the country.

title: Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Act of 2025
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committees on the Judiciary, and Education and Workforce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Stop AI Price Gouging and Wage Fixing Act of 2025 aims to prevent artificial intelligence entities from engaging in unfair pricing practices and wage manipulation. The Act likely seeks to regulate and protect consumers and workers from potential exploitation by AI-driven businesses and employment practices.

title: Deterring American AI Model Theft Act of 2026
action: Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 43 - 0.
summary: The Deterring American AI Model Theft Act of 2026 aims to prevent the unauthorized theft and misuse of American Artificial Intelligence models. This likely involves establishing laws and regulations to protect intellectual property rights in the field of AI development.

title: Research and Oversight of AI in Courts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
summary: The Research and Oversight of AI in Courts Act of 2026 is a law that aims to research and regulate the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in courts to ensure accuracy, fairness, and accountability. This act focuses on providing oversight for AI's growing presence in the judicial system, ensuring it aligns with justice and public trust.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: This policy aims to safeguard consumers from misleading artificial intelligence (AI) practices. The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act likely targets fraudulent AI activities that harm consumers.

title: Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026 aims to manage and mitigate risks associated with the use of artificial intelligence. It likely establishes guidelines and regulations for the development and deployment of AI systems in a federal context.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: The "Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act" aims to create an environment that encourages and promotes the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in financial services, likely to improve efficiency and innovation in the industry.

title: HBCU AI Research Leadership Act
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: The HBCU AI Research Leadership Act aims to promote leadership and research in artificial intelligence at Historically Black Colleges and Universities (HBCUs). The act seeks to address the disparities in AI research opportunities and funding, particularly at HBCUs.

title: K–12 AI Literacy and Readiness Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
summary: The K-12 AI Literacy and Readiness Act of 2026 aims to prepare students for a future driven by artificial intelligence by teaching them AI basics and skills. This act seeks to ensure K-12 students in the United States have the necessary knowledge and abilities to navigate and benefit from AI technology.
